name: list_numbers
description: List all phone numbers currently owned by your Vonage account. Returns detailed information about each number including the country, type (mobile, landline, toll-free), enabled features (SMS, voice), and any linked applications. Use this to audit your number inventory or find a specific number's configuration.

parameters.name: application_id
parameters.description: Filter numbers linked to a specific application ID.

parameters.name: has_application
parameters.description: Filter numbers that have (true) or don't have (false) a linked application.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Filter by two-letter country code (e.g., 'US', 'GB'). ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Filter numbers matching this pattern. Use with search_pattern parameter to control matching behavior.

parameters.name: search_pattern
parameters.description: Pattern matching strategy: 0 = starts with, 1 = anywhere, 2 = ends with. Default is 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Default is 10, maximum is 100.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Page index for pagination. First page is 1.
